sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35363" key="e)neirwneu/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνειρωνεύομαι</orth>, <sense id="n35363.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">employ irony in</tr_> a matter, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inPrm.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.728S.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
